reviews.comment:
Destaco la habitual buena atención que suelo recibir en las estaciones de servicio YPF, sumado a la destacable limpieza de sus baños, tanto los de la playa de servicios como los del restaurante adjunto.

(Translated by Google)
I would like to highlight the consistently good service I receive at YPF service stations, along with the outstanding cleanliness of the restrooms, both at the service bay and at the adjacent restaurant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzaExHZEx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención café exelentes como para parar

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, excellent coffee, worth stopping by.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzc0s2N3B3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención excelente, un lugar para pasarla bien. Las medialunas son las mejores.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, a great place to have fun. The croissants are the best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYeVpLM1Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios, rica comida y buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
Clean bathrooms, delicious food and good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYOGF1c3ZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños super limpios, la comida es espectacular... recomiendo el sándwich vegetariano q además viene con papas

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are super clean, the food is amazing... I recommend the vegetarian sandwich which also comes with fries
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYaHRXdENBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y un predio envidiable para disfrutar en la parada de vuelta de la costa. A tener en cuenta que en finde largo y recambios de temporada se llena bastante.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and an enviable location to enjoy on your way back from the coast. Keep in mind that it gets quite busy on long weekends and during seasonal changes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYcEtHbDlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada para cafe y medias lunas.  Todo rico

(Translated by Google)
Stop for coffee and croissants. Everything was delicious.

reviews.comment:
Las medialunas ya no son lo que fueron. La atención generalmente es mala, te atienden como si les sobrara la plata, pero tienen que seguir trabajando

(Translated by Google)
Croissants aren't what they used to be. The service is generally bad; they treat you like they have money to burn, but they have to keep working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYLTVtaEh3EAE

Very good attention from the beach attendants
